pattern: 说真的/说实在的 shuō zhēn de/ shuō shízài de indeed, truthfully

example.hanzi: 说真的，这次真是孩子给我上了一 课。
example.pinyin: shuō zhēn de， zhè cì zhēnshi háizi gěi wǒ shàng le yī kè。
example.en: Seriously, this time the child really gave me a lesson.

pattern: 通红、雪⽩ tōnghóng、 xuěbái very red, very white

example.pinyin: wǒ liǎn biē dé tōnghóng。
example.en: My face is red from suﬀocation.

pattern: 说 V/A 就 V/A shuō V/A jiù V/A V without thinking, be A without thinking 挺好的工作，怎么说不⼲就不⼲了？tǐnghǎo de gōngzuò， zěnme shuō bù gàn jiù bù gàn le？ Very good job, how come you quit just like that (without thinking)? 6 6.09.3LessonV/A 得要命 V/A dé yàomìng V so much one could die, so A one could die

example.en: I didn't touch my cell phone for ﬁve hours, and I feel so empty [from not having anythnig to do] I could die.

pattern: 所在 suǒzài place 他选择了⻛景秀美、⽓

example.pinyin: tā xuǎnzé le fēngjǐng xiùměi、 qìhòu yírén de suǒzài。
example.en: He chose a place with beautiful scenery and a pleasant climate.

pattern: 统统 tǒngtǒng all 影院、酒吧，统统与他⽆缘。 yǐngyuàn、 jiǔbā， tǒngtǒng yǔ tā wúyuán。 Theaters and bars (all) have nothing to do with him. 6 6.11.2Lesson以 A 为 B yǐ A wéi B regard A as B ⾼

example.hanzi: 级阶段的汉语学习应以阅读吸收为 主，语法学习为辅。
example.pinyin: gāojí jiēduàn de Hànyǔ xuéxí yīng yǐ yuèdú xīshōu wéizhǔ， yǔfǎ xuéxí wéi fǔ。
example.en: At the advanced stage of Chinese learning, [we] should consider reading and input should as the primary, [and] consider grammar learning as secondary.

pattern: 务必 wùbì must ⻜机起⻜

example.pinyin: fēijī qǐfēi qián wùbì xì hǎo ānquándài。
example.en: you must fasten your seatbelt before the plane takes oﬀ.

pattern: 难以 V nányǐ V hard to

example.hanzi: 他能否成功尚难以预料。
example.pinyin: tā néngfǒu chénggōng shàng nányǐ yùliào。
example.en: It’s still hard to predict whether he will be successful.

pattern: 不禁 V bùjīn V can’t help but to V

example.hanzi: 听到这个消息，大家不禁兴奋起来。
example.pinyin: tīngdào zhège xiāoxi， dàjiā bùjīn xīngfèn qilai。
example.en: When you heard the news, everyone couldn't help but get excited.

pattern: 随即 suíjí as soon as

example.en: As soon as Jesus was baptized, he went up out of the water.

example.en: This is not so much a photo album as the history of most of his life.

pattern: 动不动就 V dòngbudòng jiù V on a whim 他最近工作忙、压⼒大，动不动就着 急、发脾⽓。 tā zuìjìn gōngzuò máng、 yālì dà， dòngbudòng jiù zháojí、 fāpíqì。 He's been busy and stressed recently. He gets angry on a whim. 6 6.22.2Lesson甲⼄丙丁 jiǎyǐ bǐng dīng A, B, C, D (series)甲、⼄、

example.pinyin: nǐ de nénglì dàdà/ yuǎnyuǎn chāochū le wǒmen de xiǎngxiàng。
example.en: Your abilities exceeded our imagination by far.

pattern: 紧缩句 jǐnsuō jù (omitting “if” words)

example.en: ( yàoshi) bù zhànzhù， wǒ jiù kāiqiāng le。

pattern: 一个 N yī gè N with a…

example.hanzi: 他手没抓住栏杆，一个跟头栽了下 来。
example.pinyin: tā shǒu méi zhuāzhù lángān， yī gè gēntou zāi le xiàlai。
example.en: He missed the railing and fell with a ﬂip.

pattern: 向来 V/A xiànglái V/A always have (been) V/A

example.pinyin: tāmen xiànglái zhōnghòu、 lǎoshi， wéirén chéngkěn。

pattern: 当年、当时、当代dāngnián、 dāngshí、 dāngdài at that time

example.en: He is not the same man as he used to be (back in those days).

example.pinyin: nǐmen zhèyàng zuò yǒu fǎlǜ yījù ma?
